fields.description: CRYSTALLIZE A NEW FACT. If you discover a critical path or error, save it immediately to a NEW Engram. (Automatically prevents duplicates via vector similarity).
fields.name: mcp_engram_save

fields.description: Convert text to speech and save as a WAV file. Uses Piper TTS locally — no GPU, no internet, no cost. Output saves to the audio_root environment path. Available voices: male, female, child, narrator, whisper.
fields.name: mcp_tts

fields.description: Updates the CNS Axoplasm. WARNING: This does NOT save to your memory. The Axoplasm is ONLY used to route the underlying CNS execution graph..
fields.name: mcp_update_axoplasm

fields.description: Reads a specific text field from the database using strict pagination. Crucial for reading massive logs (e.g. 'application_log') without destroying your context window.
fields.name: mcp_read_record_field

fields.description: Queries the database for records. Returns a paginated list of full record data. Massive text fields are auto-truncated to protect your memory; use mcp_read_record_field to extract their full contents.
fields.name: mcp_query_model

fields.description: Returns the database schema and field sizes of a record. Use this to determine which fields hold massive data before querying.
fields.name: mcp_inspect_record

fields.description: Queries your Long-Term Hippocampus. You wake up with amnesia every turn. Use this tool frequently to search your permanent Engrams by keyword or tag.
fields.name: mcp_engram_search

fields.description: Unified git operations. Pass 'action' (status, diff, log, commit, add, stash, branch, checkout) and 'params' dict with arguments. status: {}. diff: {staged, file_path}. log: {count, oneline}. commit: {message}. add: {file_path, all_files}. stash: {action, message}. branch: {branch_name, create, delete}. checkout: {target}.
fields.name: mcp_git

fields.description: Unified Agile ticket operations (EPIC, STORY, TASK) using a flat, single-field interface. Pass only top-level string arguments: action, item_id, item_type, field_name, field_value, parent_id, query. CREATE: action='create', item_type='EPIC|STORY|TASK', field_value=<short name/title>, parent_id=<epic or story UUID when creating a STORY or TASK>. READ: action='read', item_id=<UUID>. UPDATE: action='update', item_id=<UUID>, field_name=<exact DB field>, field_value=<new value>. SEARCH: action='search', item_type='EPIC|STORY|TASK', query=<search text>. COMMENT: action='comment', item_id=<UUID>, field_value=<comment text>. Always perform atomic, single-field updates by calling this tool once per field you wish to change. All actions return a structured JSON blob describing ok, action, item_type, item_id, data, and error.
fields.name: mcp_ticket

fields.description: Appends new findings to an existing Engram in your Hippocampus. REQUIRES THE ENGRAM UUID.
fields.name: mcp_engram_update

fields.description: Your voice, your thoughts, your control over the conversation. Speak to the user, record your reasoning, and decide whether to keep working or yield the turn to the human.
fields.name: mcp_respond_to_user

fields.description: Reads the full fact of a specific Engram from your Catalog.
fields.name: mcp_engram_read

fields.description: Block for Human. Wait for User. The question has been answered. You are waiting.
fields.name: mcp_ask_user

fields.description: Spin up headless Chromium, navigate to a URL, and return clean Markdown of the page.
fields.name: mcp_browser_read

fields.description: Enjoy keeping the user and yourself in the loop by stating your thoughts as you continue to work.
fields.name: mcp_internal_monologue

fields.description: Unified filesystem operations. Pass 'action' (read, list, grep, patch) and 'params' dict with arguments. read: {path, page}. list: {path}. grep: {path, pattern, case_insensitive, page}. patch: {path, content, start_line, end_line, create}.
fields.name: mcp_fs

fields.description: Searches a massive database field for a regex pattern to find needles in haystacks without loading the entire text.
fields.name: mcp_search_record_field

fields.description: Passes the turn. Focus pool fully restored.
fields.name: mcp_pass

fields.description: To post your name to the Leader Boards and end your run use mcp_done. Use this ONLY when the absolute root objective is complete or permanently blocked.
fields.name: mcp_done

fields.description: Search the web and return Titles, URLs, and Snippets of the top 5 results.
fields.name: mcp_internet_query

fields.description: When true, pause the session and wait for the human. When false, keep working.
fields.name: yield_turn

fields.description: The integer ID of the goal (for UPDATE or COMPLETE).
fields.name: goal_id

fields.description: State your reasoning for using this tool.
fields.name: thought

fields.description: Optional Django Q-expression string, evaluated with only Q in scope. Example: "Q(status_id='<uuid>') | Q(axoplasm__var='alpha')".
fields.name: q_string

fields.description: Generic field value used for create (name), update (new value), or comment (body text).
fields.name: field_value

fields.description: The parent Epic or Story UUID.
fields.name: parent_id

fields.description: Optional background details or context to help the human answer.
fields.name: details

fields.description: A concise, factual summary of what you just did and what you need to do next. This is your memory.
fields.name: note_for_next_turn

fields.description: Voice to use: male, female, child, narrator, whisper.
fields.name: voice

fields.description: The specific question or prompt you want to ask the human.
fields.name: question

fields.description: Django ORM filter dict. Keys are field names, values are scalars or lists. Example: {'id': '<uuid>'} or {'status_id': '<uuid>', 'spike_train_id': '<uuid>'}.
fields.name: filters

fields.description: Text to display directly to the human user.
fields.name: message_to_user

fields.description: A highly descriptive, short index title (e.g. OS_SPECS).
fields.name: title

fields.description: Name for the output WAV file (saved to audio_root).
fields.name: filename

fields.description: A JSON object containing the field names and values to apply. (Deprecated for mcp_ticket in favor of flat field_name/field_value.)
fields.name: payload

fields.description: Ticket action to perform (create, update, search, comment). (Deprecated for mcp_ticket; use the top-level 'action' parameter instead.)
fields.name: ticket_action

fields.description: Dict of arguments for the selected action. (Deprecated for mcp_ticket in favor of flat arguments.)
fields.name: params
